commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: And Jesus entered into Jerusalem, and into the temple: and when he had looked around upon all things, and now the evening was come, he went out unto Bethany with the twelve. In going into the temple, immediately on entering the city, he shows what religion recommends to us, viz. to enter first into a place of worship, if there is one, where we visit. Bede) Looking into the hearts of all, he could not, amongst those who contradicted the truth, find where to recline his head; therefore, he withdraws to his faithful servants, and takes up his abode with the children of obedience.
